llms.txt.textPreview:
# Asc3nd Collective Static Preview

Purpose:
- Flyer-faithful public preview for Asc3nd Collective.
- Built from the black/gold/white youth nonprofit reference image and Asc3nd logo.
- Static HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript only. No build step, no backend.

Pages:
- / (index.html) â€” homepage: hero, mission, programs, Stories teaser, Merch teaser, contact, footer.
- /blog.html â€” Stories archive: full post grid with category filter.
- /merch.html â€” Merch: seven-product fundraising concept.
